arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim could unleash another new Manchester United attack vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Man United will be eyeing a third successive victory when they travel to the Emirates Stadium to face Arsenal on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Ruben Amorim adds new target to wishlist amid Andre Onana stance
arts.sum: Manchester United are among those considering a move for Napoli goalkeeper Alex Meret, who will find himself out of contract in the summer, with Inter Milan also keen

arts.ttl: What TV channel is Arsenal vs Man Utd? How to watch Premier League match for free
arts.sum: Football fans have the rare opportunity to watch Premier League football for free this month, including the blockbuster clash between Arsenal and Manchester United tonight

arts.ttl: Arsenal Zubimendi transfer boost to help unleash Merino amid wonderkid 'enquiry'
arts.sum: "While it may not look like an immediate priority, Arteta could very soon lose two key midfielders in Jorginho and Thomas Partey given their respective contract situations, and thus bringing in a player in that role is something that must be completed sooner rather than later. Alongside aims to bring in players ready to make an immediate impact; signing young talent for the future is also an aim, with Tuttomercatoweb claiming that Palmeiras starlet Vitor Reis is being eyed up by Arsenal and that contact has already been made, though they may face competition from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Amad and Bruno Fernandes respond to Man United star's award win as Ruben Amorim agrees
arts.sum: Manchester United announced the club's Player of the Month for November on Tuesday afternoon after Reds fans decided between Amad, Andre Onana and Noussair Mazraoui

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's scouting mission sees Man Utd manager step up chase for familiar pair
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has reportedly instructed scouts to cast their eye over FC Porto stars Francisco Moura and Samu Aghehowa after coming up against the duo during his Sporting Lisbon days

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim promises to "find a solution" to Amad Diallo's Man United contract situation
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach promises to "find a solution" to Amad Diallo's uncertain future, with his current contract set to expire at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Luke Shaw left "devastated" following latest Man United injury setback
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Luke Shaw reveals he is "devastated" after suffering a fresh injury setback following Sunday's win over Everton.

arts.ttl: Charlotte FC close to sealing deal for teenage wonderkid tracked by Atletico Madrid and Arsenal
arts.sum: The MLS side have convinced the Mali U20 international that a move to USA in an up and coming league with more regular game time would be of greater benefit to the development of his career.

arts.ttl: FPL Challenge: DOUBLE points for Man Utd stars against Arsenal
arts.sum: As well as offering clean-sheet potential, Ait-Nouri has already produced three goals and two assists this campaign, which is a clear indication of his attacking threat. Picking out defenders could be quite difficult this week, based on how disappointing most of them have been this campaign and the clean-sheet potential in general in the midweek fixtures.
